summary: Our annual climbing competition, Telegraph Turn-Up 2026, is almost here! Registration is still open for Open & Citizens climbers at all difficulty levels, and Collegiate registration closes on 2/18. Finalists will compete for a cash purse in Open Finals on February 21 & 22 at Mosaic Boulders. The event features qualifiers for the Open category on Saturday, with the top 5 advancing to Finals on Sunday at 7:00 PM.
